title: Norwegian Braised Oatmeal
description: A hearty and comforting Norwegian-inspired oatmeal dish made with rich, creamy milk.
instructions: In a large saucepan, bring 2 cups of milk to a simmer over medium heat.
Add 1 cup of oats and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in 1/4 cup of braised mixture (see notes).
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until oats have absorbed most of the liquid.
